path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\01. Title Theme - Animal Crossing.mp3
description: It's great! We all can't listen to it because it plays on Smashville but this was made by the same guys who did Gang Plank Galleon.
title: Title Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\02. Go K.K. Rider!.mp3
description: It's been haunting competitive smash players for years. It's not too bad but yeah I'm not going to choose to listen to it.
title: Go K.K. Rider!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing

filename: 04. Title Theme - Animal Crossing - Wild World (Brawl).mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\04. Title Theme - Animal Crossing - Wild World (Brawl).mp3
description: I love that cute little drumbeat. I love this particular music as well, it's something I still play on the piano. I love the little paid-off-the-loan jingle. It's actually a medley with references to 3pm, the museum, the shop and the post office. Love it!
title: Title Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing

filename: 03. Title Theme - Animal Crossing - Wild World.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\03. Title Theme - Animal Crossing - Wild World.mp3
description: I much prefer the Brawl version. Heard this too much. This one also has 3pm in it, interestingly.
title: Title Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\05. 2.00 a.m. - Animal Crossing - Wild World.mp3
description: Wild that they remixed 2am because it's not like it's music that anyone ever heard in the game really. But it is honestly a bop, so I get it. This ended up being remixed multiple times since this, and of course competitive players have heard it endlessly. It's impact.
title: 2:00 a.m.
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing

filename: 06. Town Hall & Tom Nook's Store - Animal Crossing - Wild World.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\06. Town Hall & Tom Nook's Store - Animal Crossing - Wild World.mp3
description: This is a struggle. So many remixes in smash just get forgotten. It would have better if this was forgotten, but instead we hear it in tournament. That off-key whistling in the Tom Nook part? Can't stand it.
title: Town Hall and Tom Nook's Store
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing

filename: 07. The Roost - Animal Crossing - Wild World.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\07. The Roost - Animal Crossing - Wild World.mp3
description: Great that they added this. Love it. A beautiful piano ballad from the coffee shop. Why not play smash to this! I also like the dramatic strings and horns they added to the arrangement.
title: The Roost
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing

filename: 08. Plaza & Title Theme - Animal Crossing - City Folk & Animal Crossing - Wild World.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\08. Plaza & Title Theme - Animal Crossing - City Folk & Animal Crossing - Wild World.mp3
description: I genuinely like this music. They went for a samba style similar to the Yoshi's Tale remix. And you know what they also throw in 2am theme because of that Brawl remix's impact. I've definitely heard it too much because of Town & City.
title: Plaza / Title Theme
composers: Asuka Ohta, Manaka Kataoka, Atsuko Asahi, Kazumi Totaka
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing
original-game: Animal Crossing: City Folk / Animal Crossing: Wild World

filename: 09. Outdoors at 7 p.m. (Sunny) & Main Street - Animal Crossing - New Leaf.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\09. Outdoors at 7 p.m. (Sunny) & Main Street - Animal Crossing - New Leaf.mp3
description: Genuinely love this one. It's not one of the default remixes on the Animal Crossing stages so I haven't heard it literally thousands of the times. It takes the peaceful and melancholic 7pm and adds soft, fast paced percussion. It's very different and beautiful.
title: Outdoors at 7 p.m. (Sunny) / Main Street
composers: Manaka Tominaga, Shiho Fujii, Kazumi Totaka
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\10. Kapp'n's Song.mp3
description: Cool idea to take the sea shanties and turn them into rock songs for smash. But I've heard it too much.
title: Kapp'n's Song
composers: Manaka Tominaga, Shiho Fujii, Kazumi Totaka
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\11. Tour - Animal Crossing - New Leaf.mp3
description: I like this one even if I have heard it way too much. I like how goofy and playful it is.
title: Tour
composers: Manaka Tominaga, Shiho Fujii, Kazumi Totaka
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\12. Tortimer Island Medley.mp3
description: This medley has the tour theme in there and that part specifically I really enjoy.
title: Tortimer Island Medley
composers: Manaka Tominaga, Shiho Fujii, Kazumi Totaka
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\13. Bubblegum K.K..mp3
description: This remix skyrocketed an already popular K.K. song into the stratosphere. I personally never loved it (see my rankings of K.K. songs on the nintendo music page: worldpeace.services/music/nintendo/kk) but I'm happy that more people know about K.K. Slider now.
title: Bubblegum K.K.
composers: Manaka Tominaga, Shiho Fujii, Kazumi Totaka
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\14. Title Theme - Animal Crossing - Happy Home Designer.mp3
description: I really dislike this one. It sounds like a shitty Christmas song.
title: Title Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 18 - Animal Crossing (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\15. House Preview.mp3
description: This one is a bit of a joke and bit different. Early Ultimate days it was fun to pick this in tournament. Now we're all bored of it already!
title: House Preview
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 18: Animal Crossing
